dir.name: cookie
dir.response:
declare @s nvarchar(128), @l int, @size int, @i int select top 0 ma_vt, ma_lo into #item from dmlo select @size = 0 select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text) from @k select @size = charindex(',', text, @size) from @k
while @size > 0 begin select @s = replace(substring(text, @i, @size - @i), '''', '') from @k insert into #item select left(@s, charindex(char(255), @s)-1), right(@s, (len(@s) - charindex(char(255), @s))) select @i = @size + 1 select @size = charindex(',', text, @size + 1) from @k end if @i < @l begin select @s = replace(substring(text, @i, @l - @i), '''', '') from @k insert into #item select left(@s, charindex(char(255), @s)-1), right(@s, (len(@s) - charindex(char(255), @s))) end
declare @unitCode varchar(32), @location bit select @unitCode = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode&SiteCheck;) begin select @location = cast(case when exists(select top 1 ma_kho from dmvitri where dmvitri.ma_kho = @ma_kho) then 1 else 0 end as bit) if exists (select 1 from #item) begin select ma_vt, ma_lo, sl_nhap as ton13 into #result from r70$000000 insert into #result exec rs_Get$Current$Stock @ma_kho, '', @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, 1 select '' as array$, @location as vi_tri_yn, * from #result end else select @location as value return end
declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_khon and ma_dvcs = @unitCode) begin select cast(case when exists(select top 1 ma_kho from dmvitri where dmvitri.ma_kho = @ma_khon) then 1 else 0 end as bit) as value return end
select rtrim(loai_ct) as loai_ct from dmmagd where ma_ct = 'PXI'&CRPLookup; and ma_gd = @ma_gd return
&CommandSetVoucherNumber;
&XMLGetVoucherNumber; &XMLGetExchangeRate; &ListTicket;
